title: Trying to create a ›has-video‹ relationship with invalid MAGAZINE ISSUE ID
gherkin:
Given "MAGAZINE ISSUE" "Top Gear 03_2026" does NOT exist
And there exists a "VIDEO" "Promo Video"
When the user creates a "has-video" relationship between "Top Gear 03_2026" and "Promo Video"
Then the request should be rejected with status code 404
